summary.en: Japan addresses electromagnetic disturbance from electrical products mainly through the VCCI Council framework for information-technology and many electronic apparatus, with motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies assessed for emission limits. VCCI registration and marking is a self-regulatory voluntary scheme based on CISPR-aligned JIS limits; products with radio functions also fall under separate MIC radio rules. The product must not generate excessive electromagnetic disturbance on the 100/200 V 50/60 Hz grid.
summary.zh: 日本主要通过 VCCI 协会框架处理电气产品的电磁骚扰，覆盖信息技术和许多电子设备，电机驱动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源按发射限值评估。VCCI 注册与标识为基于 CISPR 对应 JIS 限值的自律自愿方案；带无线功能的产品另受 MIC 无线规则管辖。产品在 100/200 V、50/60 Hz 电网上不得产生过量电磁骚扰。
summary.zht: 日本主要透過 VCCI 協會框架處理電氣產品的電磁騷擾，覆蓋資訊技術和許多電子設備，電機驅動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源按發射限值評估。VCCI 註冊與標識為基於 CISPR 對應 JIS 限值的自律自願方案；帶無線功能的產品另受 MIC 無線規則管轄。產品在 100/200 V、50/60 Hz 電網上不得產生過量電磁騷擾。

standards_or_laws: VCCI Council technical requirements (CISPR-aligned JIS emission limits) [self-regulatory voluntary scheme]
MIC radio regulation / Giteki (技適) for any radio function
Relevant JIS C / CISPR EMC measurement standards [voluntary technical route]

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB 3883 safety reports, with CCC EMC requirements where in scope. China test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and the marking scheme differ from the VCCI framework and still need Japan-specific review.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB 3883 安全报告之外包含 EMC 报告，适用时含 CCC 电磁兼容要求。中国测试限值、配置、最不利工况、是否包含充电器及标识方案与 VCCI 框架不同，仍需按日本要求复核。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB 3883 安全報告之外包含 EMC 報告，適用時含 CCC 電磁相容要求。中國測試限值、配置、最不利工況、是否包含充電器及標識方案與 VCCI 框架不同，仍需按日本要求覆核。

standards_or_laws: China CCC EMC requirements where applicable
China EMC standards and test reports where applicable

gap.en: A frequent Japan gap is an EMC report tested only on the bare tool or to non-Japan limits, omitting the charger, battery pack, electronic controller variants, or worst-case load conditions, and not mapped to VCCI marking. Tools with any wireless feature also need MIC Giteki, which a China EMC report does not cover.
gap.zh: 常见日本差距是 EMC 报告仅测试裸工具或采用非日本限值，遗漏充电器、电池包、电子控制器变体或最不利负载条件，且未映射到 VCCI 标识。带任何无线功能的工具还需 MIC 技适，而中国 EMC 报告并不覆盖。
gap.zht: 常見日本差距是 EMC 報告僅測試裸工具或採用非日本限值，遺漏充電器、電池包、電子控制器變體或最不利負載條件，且未映射到 VCCI 標識。帶任何無線功能的工具還需 MIC 技適，而中國 EMC 報告並不覆蓋。

target.en: VCCI is a self-regulatory voluntary scheme rather than a single statutory EMC act for tools; however, any radio function triggers a mandatory legal obligation under MIC radio law (Giteki). Emission performance is expected by the market and major channels even where the VCCI mark itself is voluntary.
target.zh: VCCI 是自律自愿方案，而非针对工具的单一法定电磁兼容法律；但任何无线功能都会触发 MIC 无线法（技适）下的强制法律义务。即便 VCCI 标志本身为自愿，市场和主要渠道也普遍要求达到发射性能。
target.zht: VCCI 是自律自願方案，而非針對工具的單一法定電磁相容法律；但任何無線功能都會觸發 MIC 無線法（技適）下的強制法律義務。即便 VCCI 標誌本身為自願，市場和主要通路也普遍要求達到發射性能。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence (CCC EMC where in scope), but Japan acceptance depends on limits, configuration, and VCCI/Giteki mapping.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 EMC 证据（适用时含 CCC 电磁兼容），但日本接受性取决于限值、配置及 VCCI/技适映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 EMC 證據（適用時含 CCC 電磁相容），但日本接受性取決於限值、配置及 VCCI/技適映射。

source.publisher: VCCI Council (Voluntary Control Council for Interference), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Japan-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system to VCCI-applicable JIS/CISPR limits, and any wireless function is separately certified under MIC Giteki. A China EMC or CCC report cannot substitute for VCCI marking or Giteki certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据按 VCCI 适用的 JIS/CISPR 限值覆盖实际销售的工具系统，且任何无线功能另行取得 MIC 技适认证之前，不能视为日本就绪。中国 EMC 或 CCC 报告不能替代 VCCI 标识或技适认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據按 VCCI 適用的 JIS/CISPR 限值覆蓋實際銷售的工具系統，且任何無線功能另行取得 MIC 技適認證之前，不能視為日本就緒。中國 EMC 或 CCC 報告不能替代 VCCI 標識或技適認證。
